原文: Lots of people find it hard to get up in the morning, and put the blame① on the alarm clock. In fact, the key to easy morning wake-up lies in resetting② your body clock. C. A better plan for sleep can help. Here's how to make one.
翻译: 许多人发现早上起床很困难，并把责任归咎于闹钟。事实上，轻松早晨起床的关键在于重置你的生物钟。C. 一个更好的睡眠计划会有所帮助。以下是如何制定一个。
必背词汇:
① blame /bleɪm/ n. 责任；责备 v. 责备，归咎于
Ⓡ blameless /ˈbleɪmləs/ adj. 无可指责的
Ⓡ blameworthy /ˈbleɪmwɜːði/ adj. 应受责备的
Ⓡ put the blame on 归咎于
② reset /ˌriːˈset/ v. 重置；重新设置
Ⓡ set /set/ v. 设置；放置
Ⓡ upset /ʌpˈset/ v. 使心烦 adj. 心烦的
Ⓡ reset button 重置按钮

原文: ·B. Find the right motivation③. In order to make a change, you need to decide why it's important. Do you want to get up in time to have breakfast with your family, get in some exercise, or just be better prepared for your day? Once you are clear about your reasons, tell your family or roommates about the change you want to make.
翻译: ·B. 找到正确的动机。为了做出改变，你需要决定为什么它很重要。你是想及时起床与家人共进早餐，进行一些锻炼，还是只为更好地准备你的一天？一旦你清楚了自己的理由，就告诉你的家人或室友你想要做出的改变。
必背词汇:
③ motivation /ˌməʊtɪˈveɪʃn/ n. 动机；动力
Ⓡ motivate /ˈməʊtɪveɪt/ v. 激励；激发
Ⓡ motive /ˈməʊtɪv/ n. 动机
Ⓡ motivational /ˌməʊtɪˈveɪʃənl/ adj. 激励的
Ⓡ lack motivation 缺乏动力

原文: ·Rethink mornings. Now that you know why you want to wake up, consider re-arranging your morning activities. If you want time to have breakfast with your family, save some time the night before by setting out clothes, shoes, and bags. G. Reconsider the 15 minutes you spend in line at the cafe to get coffee. That's a quarter-hour more you could be sleeping if you bought a coffee maker with a timer④.
翻译: ·重新思考早晨。既然你知道为什么想醒来，考虑重新安排你的早晨活动。如果你想有时间与家人共进早餐，前一天晚上通过摆好衣服、鞋子和包来节省一些时间。G. 重新考虑你在咖啡馆排队买咖啡花费的15分钟。如果你买一个带定时器的咖啡机，那可能是多睡一刻钟的时间。
必背词汇:
④ timer /ˈtaɪmə(r)/ n. 定时器；计时器
Ⓡ time /taɪm/ n. 时间 v. 计时
Ⓡ timely /ˈtaɪmli/ adj. 及时的
Ⓡ timetable /ˈtaɪmteɪbl/ n. 时间表
Ⓡ on time 准时

原文: ·Keep your sleep/wake schedule on weekends. If you're tired out by Friday night, sleeping in on Saturday could sound wonderful. But compensating⑤ on the weekends actually feeds into your sleepiness the following week, a recent study found. F. Stick to your set bedtime and wake-up time, no matter the day.
翻译: ·在周末保持你的睡眠/起床时间表。如果你周五晚上累坏了，周六睡懒觉听起来可能很棒。但最近一项研究发现，在周末补偿实际上会加剧你接下来一周的困倦。F. 坚持你设定的就寝和起床时间，无论哪一天。
必背词汇:
⑤ compensate /ˈkɒmpenseɪt/ v. 补偿；弥补
Ⓡ compensation /ˌkɒmpenˈseɪʃn/ n. 补偿；赔偿
Ⓡ compensatory /kəmˈpensətəri/ adj. 补偿性的
Ⓡ make up for 弥补
Ⓡ compensate for 补偿

原文: ·Keep a record and evaluate⑥ it weekly. Keep track of your efforts and write down how you feel. After you've tried a new method for a week, take a look at your record. E. If the steps you take are working, keep it up. If not, take another look at other methods you could try.
翻译: ·保持记录并每周评估它。跟踪你的努力并写下你的感受。在你尝试新方法一周后，看看你的记录。E. 如果你采取的措施有效，坚持下去。如果没有，再看看你可以尝试的其他方法。
必背词汇:
⑥ evaluate /ɪˈvæljueɪt/ v. 评估；评价
Ⓡ evaluation /ɪˌvæljuˈeɪʃn/ n. 评估
Ⓡ value /ˈvæljuː/ n. 价值 v. 估价
Ⓡ valuable /ˈvæljuəbl/ adj. 有价值的
Ⓡ evaluate performance 评估表现
